title: [IOS]Onboarding - Organized page has a continue button
scenario: On iOS, after skipping initial screens, tapping Continue on the Organized page navigates to the POLY LENS Login screen with Login and Continue as Guest options.
steps: Tap Skip on the initial screens.
Observe the POLY LENS Login screen.
expected: The Organized page displays a "Continue" button with text about Poly Lens location tracking. Tapping Continue leads to the POLY LENS Login screen with Login and Continue as Guest options.
